Home.title: One week that transforms lives forever
Home.description: SILC is an intensive week-long residential seminar that deepens your relationship with God through biblical teaching, counselling and intercession. Held in more than 30 countries around the world.
Home.upcomingDescription: Find a SILC seminar near you and experience this life-changing week with others.
Home.onlineTitle: SILC at your pace, wherever you are
Home.onlineDescription: Can't attend a SILC in person? SILC Online delivers the same depth of teaching and spiritual transformation directly to you, with flexibility to fit your schedule.
